name: Stars and Stripes Parfaits
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, bring rice, milk, cream, and sugar to a simmer, uncovered, for 20 minutes, stirring frequently.
2. Remove from heat. Stir in egg yolks; return mixture to the pan.
3. Bring to a boil; cook and stir for 2 minutes.
4. Add butter and vanilla. Cool.
5. Spoon half of the blueberries into five parfait glasses.
6. Top with half of the pudding mixture and half of the raspberries.
7. Repeat layers.
8. Finish with whipped cream and toasted almonds, if desired.
